description_long: This induction cooker features a sleek, rectangular black glass-ceramic cooktop with three distinct burners arranged horizontally. At the center, a metallic pot is positioned on the middle burner, which appears to be active, as indicated by a subtle glow beneath it. The cooktop is bordered by a slightly raised edge, and the control panel is located on the right side, featuring several tactile knobs and possibly touch-sensitive buttons. The surface is highly reflective, giving it a modern, polished appearance. No digital display or brand logo is visible, and there are no visible power cords. The overall design is compact and suitable for countertop use in urban kitchens or outdoor cooking setups.
description: A modern black induction cooker with three burners, a central metallic pot, and a right-side control panel with knobs. The surface is glossy and reflective, with no visible digital display or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central pot on the middle burner and the right-side control panel with knobs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting all three burners and the symmetrical layout of the cooktop.
description_view_2: Rear view with the pot still centered, less detail visible on the control panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing all three burners and the central pot, with the control panel partially visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the cooktop and consists of several round knobs arranged in a row, likely corresponding to each burner. There are no visible touch areas, labels, icons, or indicator lights.
